# Ike Starter Set — Guide

> Documentation for the IkeFoundation starter set. The comprehensive Koncept
> glossary renders from the koncepts.yml the change-set module extracts from
> the loaded store.

## Other

- [Dependencies (SBOM)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/dependencies.html.md)
- [Licenses (SPDX)](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/licenses.html.md)
- [Built With](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/built-with.html.md)

## Overview

- [About](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/index.html.md)

- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/plugin-management.html.md)
- [Project Distribution Management](https://ike.network/ike-starter-set/ike-doc/distribution-management.html.md)
